title: GeckoMan Rotating Head Electric Fly Zapper Electric Fly Swatter Racket Rechargeable Flies Killer Spider Catcher Mosquito Bug Zapper Indoor UK, with a Telescopic Extension
bullet_points: [ Patented Rotating Head Design ] Our electric fly zapper features a unique rotating head that allows for easy bug catching from any angle, including on walls or any surfaces. You can also lock the head and swing it through the air to target flying insects, just like a traditional fly zapper.

[ Extendable Telescoping Handle ] With an extendable handle that stretches from 43 to 70 CM, this electric fly zapper gives you the reach you need to target bugs in high places such as ceilings, ensuring no insect goes unnoticed.
[ Efficient Rechargeable Battery ] Equipped with a 1200mAh rechargeable battery, our electric fly zapper offers long-lasting use and can be conveniently recharged via the USB Type-C port.

[ Effective Insect Elimination ] Eliminate flying insects quickly and efficiently with a powerful 3500V electric shock. It is effective against flies, mosquitoes, fruit flies, gnats, wasps, spiders, hornets, and more. The 3-layer wire mesh design ensures safety, preventing accidental shocks.

[ Multiple Usage Options ] This versatile electric fly zapper can be used in different ways: handheld for quick swatting, standing to attract bugs, or mounted on the wall for convenient storage and as a stationary bug zapper in your home.
